Longer term (weekly and monthly), the trend is bearish as price is below weekly and monthly MAs and Monthly RSI is very low (33.33). Considering the short-term overbought conditions alongside medium to longer-term bearish signals, a HOLD position might be appropriate to wait for a clearer trend.
